title: Ice Cream Bar Ingredient Infographic Render AI
sourceTitle: Ice Cream Bar Ingredient Infographic Render AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photorealistic commercial product render of Golden Crunch Ice Cream Bar, presented as a centered ice cream bar with ingredient labels and curved arrows. Subject: Golden Crunch Ice Cream Bar is an upright rounded-rectangle ice cream bar on a wooden stick, with milk chocolate shell, vanilla cream center, almond crunch pieces, caramel ribbon, and crispy wafer inclusions visible through glossy coating, embedded inclusions, and clean product detail. Scene: Warm golden-yellow gradient studio background with smooth matte texture, subtle vignette, and a soft shadow beneath the stick. Composition: Fixed 3:4 product infographic layout: single ice cream bar vertically centered, ingredient callouts arranged around it, curved arrows connecting labels to product layers, and clean negative space for readability. Signature Elements: Preserved ice cream bar ingredient infographic render source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: 8K photorealistic commercial product render with food-advertising polish, glossy chocolate specular highlights, realistic frozen texture, crisp ingredient icons, and premium FMCG campaign clarity. Color Palette: Fixed warm golden-yellow background, milk-chocolate browns, creamy interior tones, wooden stick beige, small ingredient accent colors, and clean white label panels. Lighting: Soft frontal studio light emphasizing chocolate gloss, balanced fill for texture detail, gentle specular highlights, and soft product shadow. Typography: GOLDEN CRUNCH appears as a clean readable product headline; Milk Chocolate, Vanilla Cream, Almond Crunch, Caramel Ribbon, Crispy Wafer appear as small concise ingredient labels around the bar. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
